\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4218 introduces Critical Quantum Magnetic Flux Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\Phi_{\text{critical}} = \sqrt{\hbar c^3/Ge^2} \times \alpha$
\]
